title: Mob Biscuits
description: Adds biscuits (cookies if you prefer) with mob faces.
body:
# Mob Biscuits
Mob Biscuits is a minecraft mod for fabric & neoforge that adds biscuits (or cookies if you prefer) with mobs' faces stamped in them.
## How to use
First craft the Biscuit Press like so:

![Biscuit Press recipe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/74bd474644634ab4aef19d60d76a372727681d89_0.webp)

Then, hit a supported mob (see below) with it to stamp it's face into the press. You can only do this once per press item and you can see what mob face is stamped into it on the tooltip.
Then, with the mob face stamped in, you can craft a biscuit with the mob face stamped into it by adding the press item in the center below the vanilla biscuit (cookie) recipe.

![Creeper Biscuit recipe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/72d6c0d7f899f1743ca2cbb246fb016d696c28a4.png)

## Supported mobs
Currently, the mod supports these mobs:
- Cow
- Creaking
- Creeper
- Pig
- Sheep
- Skeleton
- Slime
- Zombie

## Why biscuit and not cookie?
Because
